calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.,
No appearance by defaulted defendant MARTINI MEDIA NETWORK, INC. AKA MARTINI MEDIA AKA MARTINI-LIFE CORP AKA MARTINI LIFE,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Kevin Smith sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $251,660.25
Pre-Judgment Interest: $32,060.83
Attorney's Fees: $1200.00
Costs: $509.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $285,431.03

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Continued To Jan-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
